description: You are covering for a colleague who is on leave. Your inbox contains 50 unread emails from various mailing lists (Security, Development, Community). Triage these by forwarding at least two security-related emails to 'security-team@techcorp.org', at least two development-related emails to 'dev-team@techcorp.org', and at least one community/general email to 'community-lead@techcorp.org'. Compose a summary email to 'director@techcorp.org' with the subject 'Handoff Summary' mentioning which teams you have delegated tasks to. Do not delete or move the original emails from the inbox.
